title: Thrive - SaaS Inventory Management
description: High-traffic inventory management platform serving 100,000+ daily active users. As Senior Software Engineer I architected core modules in a Python/Django + TypeScript/React system, built 4 deep integrations (Clover, QuickBooks, Shopify, Square) syncing 10M+ transactions/day, and led the integration of Generative AI for invoice parsing and automated PR review.

title: Turbo Notes - Full-stack notes application
description: A full-stack notes app: create, edit, categorize and filter notes with debounced autosave (~500ms) and per-category theming. Built with Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19 and TypeScript on the frontend, and Django REST Framework + PostgreSQL on the backend. Features JWT auth via httpOnly cookies, server-side rendering with streaming skeletons, and full test coverage (Playwright E2E + unit tests).
